name: Story Circle
description: An 8-beat simplified Hero's Journey designed for episodic TV writing. Elegant and versatile — works for individual episodes, seasons, or feature-length stories.

structure.title: Act I — You / Need / Go / Search

children.title: You (Comfort Zone)
children.synopsis: Establish a character in their zone of comfort.

scenes.title: You
scenes.synopsis: Show who the character is in their familiar world.

scenes.title: Need
scenes.synopsis: Reveal what the character wants or needs — even if they don't know it yet.

scenes.title: Go
scenes.synopsis: The character crosses into new territory to pursue their desire.

children.title: Search (Adaptation)
children.synopsis: They adapt to the new situation.

scenes.title: Search
scenes.synopsis: The character struggles, learns, and adapts to the new world.

structure.title: Act II — Find / Take / Return / Change

scenes.title: Find
scenes.synopsis: The character achieves their goal — but at the midpoint, not the end.

children.title: Take (Pay the Price)
children.synopsis: But they pay a heavy price for it.

scenes.title: Take
scenes.synopsis: Success has consequences. The character must pay for what they got.

children.title: Return (Go Back)
children.synopsis: They return to their familiar situation.

scenes.title: Return
scenes.synopsis: The character heads back to where they started, changed by the journey.

scenes.title: Change
scenes.synopsis: The character is fundamentally different. Show the transformation.
